summary: Tested Social Media Fields Feature for Digital Card. All 8 features working correctly: (1) Edit Digital Card shows URL prefix labels (facebook.com/, instagram.com/, linkedin.com/in/, x.com/, tiktok.com/@, youtube.com/@), (2) Placeholder text shows just 'yourprofile'/'yourhandle', (3) @ symbol auto-stripped when typing, (4) Profile stores just usernames (verified via API), (5) Digital Card shows social icons for platforms with usernames, (6) Clicking icons opens constructed URLs, (7) Icons don't appear for empty platforms, (8) Backwards compatibility with existing data ('its4est', 'im4est', 'forestward') works correctly.
seed_data_creation: Used existing social links data: facebook='its4est', instagram='im4est', linkedin='forestward'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social Media Fields feature verified working: (1) SOCIAL_PLATFORMS array in my-profile.tsx defines platforms with prefix and placeholder, (2) socialInputRow style shows prefix label followed by editable input, (3) onChangeText handler strips @ with text.replace(/^@/, ''), (4) Digital Card [userId].tsx uses SOCIAL_PLATFORMS with baseUrl, (5) URL construction: username.startsWith('http') ? username : baseUrl + username - supports both legacy full URLs and new username-only format, (6) activeSocialLinks filters platforms with non-empty usernames for icon display.

edit_digital_card_social_inputs.url_prefix_labels: PASS - facebook.com/, instagram.com/, linkedin.com/in/, x.com/, tiktok.com/@, youtube.com/@
edit_digital_card_social_inputs.data_testid_coverage: NOTE - Social inputs don't have data-testid, but parent section is collapsible

digital_card_social_icons.icons_visible: PASS - Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn icons visible on card
digital_card_social_icons.icons_hidden_when_empty: PASS - Twitter/TikTok/YouTube icons not shown (no usernames)
digital_card_social_icons.url_construction: PASS - Code constructs full URL from baseUrl + username

backend_api.username_storage: PASS - Stores just usernames, not full URLs

mocked_api.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sending is mocked in this environment
